summary: The board is always 8 by 8, so a move has exactly eight rays and each ray contains at most seven cells; the complete legal contract has no scalable runtime dimension.

workload_bound.source_constraint: board has exactly 8 rows and 8 columns

replacement_checks.evidence: Eight directions with at most seven cells per direction impose a fixed upper bound of 56 cell inspections.
The certificate regression constructs every direction and every endpoint span from two through seven, and also removes each closing endpoint to verify rejection.
